mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_audit_checklist_template WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_checklist_template WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_audit_checklist_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_audit_checklist_template WHERE audit_type = #{auditType} AND deleted = 0 AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_checklist_template WHERE template_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_audit_checklist_template ( template_id, audit_type, title, description, content, inspection_date, inspection_location, inspection_dept, person_in_charge, inspector, reviewer, inspection_type, inspection_count, overall_result, total_score, is_active, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{templateId}, #{auditType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{content}, #{inspectionDate}, #{inspectionLocation}, #{inspectionDept}, #{personInCharge}, #{inspector}, #{reviewer}, #{inspectionType}, #{inspectionCount}, #{overallResult}, #{totalScore}, #{isActive}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_audit_checklist_template SET audit_type = #{auditType}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, content = #{content}, inspection_date = #{inspectionDate}, inspection_location = #{inspectionLocation}, inspection_dept = #{inspectionDept}, person_in_charge = #{personInCharge}, inspector = #{inspector}, reviewer = #{reviewer}, inspection_type = #{inspectionType}, inspection_count = #{inspectionCount}, overall_result = #{overallResult}, total_score = #{totalScore}, is_active = COALESCE(#{isActive}, is_active), modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit_checklist_template SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_audit_checklist_item WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_audit_checklist_item WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_audit_checklist_item SET section = #{section}, item_text = #{itemText}, legal_ref = #{legalRef}, is_critical = #{isCritical}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit_checklist_item SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_audit_checklist_result (audit_id, item_id, check_status, created_at, modified_at) SELECT #{auditId}, i.id, 'UNCHECKED', GETDATE(), GETDATE() FROM tb_audit_checklist_item i WHERE i.template_id = #{templateId} AND i.deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, i.section, i.item_text, i.legal_ref, i.is_critical, i.sort_order FROM tb_audit_checklist_result r INNER JOIN tb_audit_checklist_item i ON r.item_id = i.id WHERE r.audit_id = #{auditId} ORDER BY i.sort_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_audit_checklist_result SET check_status = #{checkStatus}, checked_by = #{checkedBy}, checked_at = #{checkedAt}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
